loc_desc: Set your currency, business type and language. These shape how AskBiz presents data and answers.
currency_desc: Used in all AI answers, charts and tools
biztype_desc: Shapes how AskBiz frames answers and recommendations
profile_desc: Update your display name and view your account details.
google_desc: Sign in with your Google account
magic_link_desc: Sign in with a one-time link sent to your email
passkey_desc: Sign in with Face ID, Touch ID, or a security key
team_desc: Invite colleagues and manage their roles and permissions.
team_upgrade_title: Team collaboration is a Business feature
team_upgrade_desc: Invite up to 5 team members with role-based access — analysts, accountants, buyers, and more.
team_no_members: No team members yet. Invite your first colleague above.
address_desc: Used as the sender address when generating live shipping quotes. Sent directly to the courier — never shared.
address_complete_hint: Add your address to unlock live parcel quotes in the search bar.
integrations_desc: Connect your business tools so AskBiz can answer questions using your live data.
int_csv_hint: No integration yet? Upload a CSV or Excel file from the chat page — instant analysis, no connection needed.
ai_desc: Control how AskBiz formats and presents answers. Changes apply immediately across all conversations.
ai_charts_desc: Automatically render charts when the answer contains numeric or trend data
ai_kpi_desc: Show key metrics as highlighted cards at the top of each answer
ai_followup_desc: Suggest next questions after every answer to help you dig deeper
ai_cfo_desc: Board-ready responses — percentage-first language, executive summaries and formal tone
ai_pref_hint: These preferences are saved to your browser and apply to all future questions.
notifications_desc: Choose how AskBiz reaches you when something needs your attention.
notif_email_alerts_desc: Receive an email when a critical or warning alert fires.
notif_whatsapp_desc: Get a WhatsApp message for stock, revenue, and shipment alerts.
notif_whatsapp_hint: Include country code (e.g. +44 for UK, +234 for Nigeria). Must be a WhatsApp-enabled number.
notif_info: AskBiz checks your data every 4 hours and sends alerts for low stock, revenue drops, delayed shipments, and sector news relevant to your business and region.
api_desc: Create and manage API keys to integrate AskBiz into your own products and workflows.
privacy_desc: Control how AskBiz uses your business data. All settings are optional and can be changed at any time.
priv_financial_desc: Store aggregated financial metrics to personalise AI answers. No individual transactions are ever stored.
priv_improve_desc: Use fully anonymised interactions to improve AI accuracy. Your business is never identifiable.
priv_camera_desc: Allow AskBiz POS to access your device camera for barcode and price tag scanning. Images are processed in real time and never stored on our servers.
priv_logistics_desc: Process parcel tracking, delivery routes, vehicle inspection photos, and driver handover records. Logistics data is retained for 12 months after delivery completion.
priv_payment_desc: Card payments are processed by Stripe. Mobile money payments (M-Pesa, MTN, Airtel) are processed via PesaPal. AskBiz never sees or stores your card details or mobile money PINs.
priv_read_full_post: to understand how your data is handled.
account_desc: Manage your subscription, export your data, or close your account.
acc_deletion_pending_desc: Your data will be deleted within 30 days. You can cancel this request at any time.
acc_export_desc: Download everything AskBiz holds about you (GDPR Article 15)
acc_delete_desc: Permanently delete your account and all data within 30 days (GDPR Article 17)
acc_modal_desc: This will permanently delete all your data. Your request will be processed within 30 days in accordance with GDPR Article 17.
acc_reason_placeholder: Tell us why you are leaving…
acc_deletion_toast: Deletion request submitted. Your data will be deleted within 30 days.
compliance_desc: GDPR, ICO registration, VAT, and data residency information for your account.
comp_ico_hint: Required if you process personal data in the UK.
comp_vat_hint: Used on receipts and MTD-compatible VAT exports from your POS data.
comp_mtd_li4: Net, VAT, and gross columns per line item
comp_anon_benchmark_desc: Contribute fully anonymised, aggregated metrics to AskBiz's collective intelligence layer. This powers answers like "How will my chocolates sell in Kenya?" — no individual business is ever identifiable.
comp_anon_benchmark_note: Opt out at any time. Only sector, region, and aggregated values are shared — never your business name, products, or transactions.
comp_global_price_title: Contribute to the global price pool
comp_global_price_desc: Share anonymised selling prices and channel data from your connected stores. In return, see what products are actually selling for across thousands of merchants worldwide — by channel, region, and trend. Your identity, cost prices, and business name are never shared.
comp_global_price_note: Enabled by default for new accounts. Only product names, selling prices, channel, and region are pooled — aggregated across 3+ merchants minimum before any signal is published. You can opt out at any time.
spotlight_desc: A free way to get seen — real AskBiz businesses rotate through the signin page for every visitor. Submissions are reviewed before going live.
spotlight_show_desc: Pause anytime without losing your submission
spotlight_logo_error: Could not read that image — try another file
spotlight_tagline_placeholder: e.g. Hand-woven kitenge, made in Nairobi
spotlight_link_label: Link (optional) — WhatsApp, Instagram, or your store
spotlight_required: Business name and tagline are both required
